name: Okteto Cloud Development API
what_it_does: Kubernetes-native cloud development platform with REST API — providing persistent cloud development environments (CDEs), ephemeral preview environments for PRs, and development namespace management for Kubernetes-based teams to replace local development.
use_cases: Creating and managing cloud development environments for team members via API
Deploying ephemeral preview environments for pull requests automatically via CI/CD
Querying development namespace status and resource usage for cost management
Automating development environment provisioning for new team members
Integrating Okteto environment URLs into PR comments or Slack notifications
not_for: Production environment management (use ArgoCD or Helm for production)
Simple VM-based cloud development (use AWS Cloud9 or VS Code Remote)
best_when: A Kubernetes-native team wants ephemeral preview environments per PR and persistent cloud development namespaces that replace local Kubernetes setup.
avoid_when: You don't use Kubernetes, need production deployment management, or need simple local development without cloud overhead.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for SSO integration. Personal access token for API and CLI. Organization-scoped access. GitHub, Google, SAML SSO options. No fine-grained API scopes — organization-level access.

pricing.notes: Free tier for small teams. Per-developer pricing. US-based company (San Francisco). Self-hosted (open-source) or Okteto Cloud SaaS. Strong Kubernetes ecosystem integration. Preview environments (ephemeral per PR) is key differentiator. GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket integrations.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for namespace management, deployments, and environment status. OAuth2 for SSO. No webhooks. CLI is primary interface — REST API for programmatic access. Good documentation. Self-hosted option with open-source core. Kubernetes-native — understand k8s resource management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Namespace creation idempotent by name. Deployment operations create new resources. Environment status reads idempotent. Wake/sleep operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: CLI is primary interface — REST API wraps CLI operations
Kubernetes namespace management — understand k8s resource lifecycle
Preview environments require CI/CD pipeline integration (GitHub Actions preferred)
Self-hosted vs Okteto Cloud have different API endpoint patterns

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. OAuth2 SSO. US/EU data residency. Organization-scoped tokens. Self-hosted option for maximum control. Kubernetes RBAC for namespace isolation. Open-source core for transparency.
